name: f25-pupperazzi
description: This branch implements Task #62: - Created a **PHP Hello World** page (`index.php`) to prove PHP + MySQL connectivity on the aptitude server. - Added a simple **`api.php`** endpoint that returns JSON from the database. - Built a **React proof-of-concept (POC)** app using Vite, deployed under `/react/`, which fetches and displays data from `api.php`. - Added research notes as a `.txt` file in the `documents/` folder.
